zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Champernoun是Sir Richard Champernowne和Elizabeth Valletort的兒子，於1314年出生在英國戴文莫德波利。他於大約1334年與Eleanor Rohaut在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Champernoun是Sir Richard Champernowne和Elizabeth Valletort的儿子，于1314年出生在英国戴文莫德波利。他于大约1334年与Eleanor Rohaut在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Champernoun was born in 1314, in Modbury, Devon, England as the son of Sir Richard Champernowne and Elizabeth Valletort. He married Eleanor Rohaut about 1334, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1387.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Champernounは1314年にイギリスデボンモドブリーでSir Richard ChampernowneとElizabeth Valletortの息子として生まれた。約1334年にイギリスコルンワルでEleanor Rohautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Champernoun(은)는 1314년 영국 데폰 모드버이에서 Sir Richard Champernowne(와)과 Elizabeth Valletort의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1334년 영국 코른월에서 Eleanor Rohaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 이후 사망했다.

ru.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Champernoun родился в 1314 г. в местности модбури, девон, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Richard Champernowne и Elizabeth Valletort. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Rohaut около 1334 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1387 г.
